'''Tossk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] who was wanted [[Death/Legends|dead]] by [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] for unknown reasons; though, it was known he worked for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the Hutt, Gardulla's biggest rival. This [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
